positive: A minimalist, geometric illustration of a mountain range at sunrise, rendered in a highly stylized, negative-space silhouette style. The mountains are formed by solid, deep indigo and charcoal black shapes against a vibrant gradient sky of blush pink, soft lavender, and warm saffron yellow. Scattered throughout the composition are stylized, abstract elements like small constellations and crescent moons, drawn with thin, contrasting gold foil accents. The overall composition is perfectly centered and balanced, designed for maximum visual impact on apparel. Use crisp, clean edges and a graphic, flat aesthetic. Vector art quality, high contrast, suitable for screen printing.
